for_sales.sales_text: Shilling Yawl by Willow Bay Boats 2 Berth, Tohatsu 5hp, Rapide trailer (with arms). The light main mast is easily lowered singlehanded and is simply left in tabernacle for towing.

boat.full_description:
Designed and built by Phil Swift.  Marjory draws 12" with centreboard up. She has two full length berths, seated headroom, a spirit stove, ample storage and sealed buoyancy, yet she's only 16' 9" long (excl. bowsprit and bumpkin) and is very easilly towed by a 1.9 litre family car.  There was an article/review on her in Watercraft magazine (Jan/Feb 1999).

She is a joy to sail and was overall winner of the Yarmouth Old Gaffers Race 2014.
boat.name: Marjory
boat.short_description: 'Marjory' is a 16'9" Shilling gaff yawl designed and built by Phil Swift of Willow Bay Boats - in cedar strip/epoxy, 1998.
